hero.title: Take Action
hero.description: Ways to get involved in the mission – whether by giving, serving or multiplying impact.

cards.title: Give
cards.description: Your gift helps send young leaders to the places that need them most, fueling this movement to go where they are needed.

cards.title: Volunteer
cards.description: Volunteers help make Arise Asia possible, serving faithfully through logistics, hospitality, prayer teams, and other practical ways here today.

learnMore.heading: New to Arise Asia?
learnMore.body: Arise Asia is a leadership movement launched in 2023 to inspire young adults across Asia and beyond to bring their faith and presence where it is needed most. Learn more about who we are today.

cards.title: Prayer Movement
cards.description: Join believers across Asia praying faithfully for this generation to rise up and serve wherever God calls them.

cards.title: Represent Arise Asia
cards.description: Help carry the vision of Arise Asia into your church, campus, or community as a trusted, local voice today.

cards.title: Become a Mentor
cards.description: Walk alongside a young leader with wisdom, prayer, and encouragement as they discern their calling and next faithful step.

cards.title: Bring Arise Asia to your country
cards.description: Help bring an Arise gathering to your nation and mobilise young leaders to serve wherever God is calling them.

cards.title: Become a Sending Partner
cards.description: Partner with Arise Asia to send, support, and commission young leaders into cross-cultural service around the world today, together.
